name: WLF_CM_RENDITIONS
description: Table to store of video renditions.

columns.Name: RENDITION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Parent/video content entity id.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTOR
columns.Comments: Descriptor of the video rendition.

columns.Name: PLAYLIST
columns.Comments: Play-list information of the video rendition.

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: External storage source URL for the video rendition.

columns.Name: NUMBER_OF_SEGMENTS
columns.Comments: Number of segments/chunks in the video rendition.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: The duration of the video rendition in seconds.

columns.Name: FRAME_WIDTH
columns.Comments: Frame width in pixels of the video rendition.

columns.Name: FRAME_HEIGHT
columns.Comments: Frame height in pixels of the video rendition.

columns.Name: VIDEO_PROTOCOL
columns.Comments: Protocol of the video rendition.

columns.Name: VIDEO_FORMAT
columns.Comments: Format of the video rendition.

columns.Name: VIDEO_CODEC
columns.Comments: Codec of the video rendition.

columns.Name: VIDEO_BITRATE
columns.Comments: Bit-rate of the video rendition.

columns.Name: FRAME_RATE
columns.Comments: Frame rate in fps of the video rendition.

columns.Name: AUDIO_FORMAT
columns.Comments: Audio format of the video rendition.

columns.Name: AUDIO_CODEC
columns.Comments: Audio codec of the video rendition.

columns.Name: AUDIO_BITRATE
columns.Comments: Audio bit-rate in kbps of the video rendition.

columns.Name: AUDIO_CHANNELS
columns.Comments: Number of audio channels of the video rendition.

columns.Name: AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE
columns.Comments: Audio sample rate in Hz of the video rendition.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
